*   `hE1proj`: `E1 ε2 n = ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)).proj_lt (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) • ↑(@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n))`
*   `hE2leProj`: `E2 ε2 n ≤ ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)).proj_lt (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)) • ↑(@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n))`
*   `hE3comm`: `Commute ↑(E3 ε2 n) ↑(↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).log`

*   `hEsum`: `E1 ε2 n + E2 ε2 n + E3 ε2 n = 1`

The main goal is:
`⊢ 0 ≤ ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) - ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝¹ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) * ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)).inner (P1 ε2 n)`

This goal is equivalent to:
`ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) ≥ ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝¹ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) * ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)).inner (P1 ε2 n)`

We can prove this using `linarith` with the established lemmas. Note that `P1 ε2 n` is defined as `(Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) • ↑(@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n)).proj_le ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))`. Also, `hE1proj` gives `E1 ε2 n = ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)).proj_lt ...`.

The line of thought is that `E1 ε2 n`, `E2 ε2 n`, and `E3 ε2 n` form a partition of unity (`hEsum`). The terms `P1 ε2 n` and `P2 ε2 n` are related to these projectors. `hE1leq`, `hE2leq`, and `hE3leq` provide upper bounds for terms involving these projectors and logarithms. `hc'` and `hσ''` provide bounds for `c'` and `σ''`. These together should be sufficient for `linarith`.

theorem optimalHypothesisRateSecondOrderAnalysis (ι : Type u_1) [UnitalFreeStateTheory ι] (i : ι) (ρ : MState (H i)) (σ : (n : ℕ) → ↑IsFree) (ε ε' : Prob) (hε'₁ : 0 < ε') (hε'₂ : ε' < ε) (hε : ε < 1) (hR1R2 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) (hR1 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε ≠ ⊤) (hR2 : @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ ≠ ⊤) (hε₀✝ : 0 < @SteinsLemma.ε₀_func✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε σ ε') (m : ℕ) (hm : m ≥ 1 ∧ 𝐃(statePow ρ m‖↑(σ m)) / ↑m < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ + ↑⟨@SteinsLemma.ε₀_func✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε σ ε', ⋯⟩) (ε₀ : ℝ := @SteinsLemma.ε₀_func✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε σ ε') (hε₀ : 0 < ε₀) (hε₀' : ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) ≤ ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀) (hliminf_le : Filter.liminf (fun n => (OptimalHypothesisRate ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) ε {@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n}).negLog / ↑n) Filter.atTop ≤ ↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε))) (hlimsup_le : ∀ (ε1 : Prob), 0 < ↑ε1 ∧ ↑ε1 < 1 → Filter.limsup (fun n => (OptimalHypothesisRate ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) (1 - ε1) {@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n}).negLog / ↑n) Filter.atTop ≤ ↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩)) : Filter.liminf (fun n => (OptimalHypothesisRate ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) (1 - ε') {@SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ n}).negLog / ↑n) Filter.atTop ≤ ↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε)) := by

  -- Define the necessary helper functions and lemmas
  let σ'' := @SteinsLemma.σ''✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε m σ
  let σ₁_c := @SteinsLemma.σ₁_c✝ ι inst✝ i
  let σ₁_c' := @SteinsLemma.σ₁_c'✝ ι inst✝ i
  let ε₀ := @SteinsLemma.ε₀_func✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε σ ε'
  let E := fun n => (statePow ρ n)
  let ℓ := fun n => (1 : ℝ) / ↑n

  -- Define the projectors P1 and P2
  let P1 := fun ε2 n => (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) • ↑(σ'')).proj_le ↑(E n)
  let P2 := fun ε2 n => (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)) • ↑(σ'')).proj_le ↑(E n)

  -- Define the commutative relations
  have hP1_comm : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Commute (P1 ε2 n).toMat (E n (ρ ⊗ˢ^[n]).M.log.toMat) := by
    intro ε2 n
    unfold P1
    rw [HermitianMat.proj_le_def]
    apply HermitianMat.cfc_commute
    apply Commute.sub_left
    · simp only [HermitianMat.val_eq_coe, MState.toMat_M, Commute.refl]
    · apply Commute.smul_left
      apply Commute.symm
      exact pinching_commutes (ρ ⊗ˢ^[n]) (σ'')

  have hP2_comm : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Commute (P2 ε2 n).toMat (E n (ρ ⊗ˢ^[n]).M.log.toMat) := by
    intro ε2 n
    unfold P2
    rw [HermitianMat.proj_le_def]
    apply HermitianMat.cfc_commute
    apply Commute.sub_left
    · simp only [HermitianMat.val_eq_coe, MState.toMat_M, Commute.refl]
    · apply Commute.smul_left
      apply Commute.symm
      exact pinching_commutes (ρ ⊗ˢ^[n]) (σ'')

  -- Define the commutative relations for E1, E2, E3
  have hE1_comm : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Commute (E1 ε2 n).toMat (E n (ρ ⊗ˢ^[n]).M.log.toMat) := by
    intro ε2 n
    unfold E1

    intro ε2 n
    unfold E2

  have hE3leq : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), (1 / ↑n : ℝ) • (E3 ε2 n).toMat * (E n (ρ ⊗ˢ^[n]).M.log.toMat - (σ'' (ρ ⊗ˢ^[n])).M.log.toMat) ≤ c' ε2 n • (E3 ε2 n).toMat := by

    have hE3 := hE3_comm ε2 n
    apply rexp_mul_smul_proj_lt_mul_sub_le_mul_sub' hE3 (by positivity) (by positivity) (by simpa using σ''_posdef ρ ε m σ n)

  have hP1leq : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), E1 ε2 n ≤ P1 ε2 n := by
    intro ε2 n
    unfold E1 P1
    simp
    apply proj_lt_of_le
    apply rexp_smul_le_one_of_nonneg

      have h_comm' : Commute (P1 ε2 n).toMat ((σ'' (ρ ⊗ˢ^[n])).M.log.toMat) := by

          apply Commute.sub_right
          · exact h_comm
          · simp only [neg_smul, neg_mul, neg_le_neg_iff]
            rw [← sub_nonneg, ← mul_sub_left_distrib]
            simp only [one_div, Algebra.smul_mul_assoc]
            have hE3commlog : Commute (P1 ε2 n).toMat ((σ'' (ρ ⊗ˢ^[n])).M.log.toMat - (E n (ρ ⊗ˢ^[n])).M.log.toMat) := by

              · apply hP1_comm ε2 n
              · simp only [neg_smul, neg_mul, neg_le_neg_iff]
                rw [← sub_nonneg, ← mul_sub_left_distrib]
                simp only [one_div, Algebra.smul_mul_assoc]
                apply Commute.mul_nonneg (inv_nonneg_of_nonneg (Nat.cast_nonneg' n)) (by simpa using MState.zero_le (E n (ρ ⊗ˢ^[n])))

    · apply hP2_comm ε2 n
    · simp only [neg_smul, neg_mul, neg_le_neg_iff]
      have h_comm : Commute (P2 ε2 n).toMat ((E n (ρ ⊗ˢ^[n])).M.log.toMat) := by
        apply hP2_comm ε2 n
      have h_comm' : Commute (P2 ε2 n).toMat ((σ'' (ρ ⊗ˢ^[n])).M.log.toMat) := by
